title: Elastic Injector
description: Definition of an Elasticsearch document injection

documents.description: List of documents to inject into Elasticsearch

index.description: The name of the Elasticsearch index to inject the document into

file.description: Path to a JSON template file containing the document to inject. Supports placeholder substitution

pack.description: Pack name providing the template (e.g., 'base'). Required when 'template' is used

vars.description: Variables to substitute in the template file using {{variable_name}} syntax
